name: Market Entry Intake
description: Market entry strategy intake for organizations entering a new geography, segment, or product category. Evaluates market definition, competitive landscape, entry mode, regulatory exposure, route to market, resource requirements, and organizational readiness to produce a market entry profile with gap analysis, risk flags, and recommended pre-entry actions.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Market Entry Profile
types.description: Generated market entry profile from intake session data.
